channel.title: J.R. Corvane Dispatches
channel.description: Notes on fantasy, history, worldbuilding, creative influences, and The Sundering Bloodlines.

item.title: Why Every Kingdom Edits Its Own History
item.description: The most durable lies contain enough truth to survive scrutiny.
item.dc:creator: J.R. Corvane

item.title: Why Broken Oaths Make Such Good Fantasy
item.description: An oath turns a private choice into a promise the whole world can judge.
item.dc:creator: J.R. Corvane

item.title: Building a World That Remembers Its Wounds
item.description: A catastrophe should leave more behind than a ruined tower and a date in a chronicle.
item.dc:creator: J.R. Corvane
